system.en: Commandery-County System with Three Lords Nine Ministers

description.zh: 秦始皇统一六国后建立了中国第一个中央集权制国家。废分封、行郡县，以三公（丞相、太尉、御史大夫）为核心行政架构，九卿分管具体事务。法家思想治国，令行禁止，赏罚分明。
description.en: After unifying the six states, Qin Shi Huang established China's first centralized imperial state. Abolished feudalism for commandery-county system, with Three Lords (Chancellor, Grand Commandant, Imperial Censor) as core administration and Nine Ministers managing specific affairs. Governed by Legalist principles with strict enforcement.
